message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "RosterOccupyController" as RosterOccupyController
participant "RosterOccupyBiz" as RosterOccupyBiz

User ->> RosterOccupyController: 根据申诉时间获取可占用班次
RosterOccupyController -> RosterOccupyBiz: 获取占用班次
RosterOccupyBiz -> RosterOccupyBiz: 获取临近三天的排班和失败班次
RosterOccupyBiz -> RosterOccupyBiz: 过滤出与申诉时间有交集的班次
RosterOccupyBiz -> RosterOccupyBiz: 过滤出已经结束的班次(当前班次已有考勤上、下班记录或已经在下班结束后的2小时之后)
RosterOccupyBiz -> RosterOccupyBiz: 计算班次的剩余工时
RosterOccupyBiz -> RosterOccupyBiz: 过滤出剩余工时 > 0 的班次
RosterOccupyBiz <- RosterOccupyController: 返回
User <- RosterOccupyController: 返回

@enduml
